name: Enterprise Privacy Policy Engine (EPPE)
headline: High-traffic Drupal 10 portal managing Medicaid privacy policy workflows for the federal government.
problem: The existing EPPE portal needed a secure, compliant, custom workflow engine for Data Use Agreement (DUA) policies with role-based approvals, media-dispositioning, and automated notifications — while running on Drupal 10 and PHP 8.4 with zero-downtime deployments.
impact: Redesigned global features — PDF generation, advanced search, filtering, and cron-based automated DUA-policy notifications at 15/30/45/60-day intervals.
Shipped role-based workflow enhancements supporting complex approval hierarchies and fine-grained permissions.
Delivered AWS + Kubernetes deployments with Docker/DDEV local dev and Jenkins pipelines, achieving zero-downtime release cycles.

name: Universal Navigation (UNAV) — NY State Portals
headline: Standardized header, footer, and navigation across ~8,000 subdomains of New York State portals (DOT, DMV, CSEA, and more).
problem: New York's government web ecosystem spanned thousands of subdomains with inconsistent navigation, branding, and accessibility. A single reusable UNAV component system was needed.
impact: Core contributor to a design system rolled out across ~8,000 subdomains.
Built Storybook-driven reusable React components integrated into Drupal 9 themes on Acquia Cloud.
Delivered multi-language translation + WCAG 2.1 compliance across DOT, DMV, and CSEA portals.
Mentored 12 developers on Drupal 9 multi-site and Acquia deployment workflows.

name: CALTRANS — PHP & Drupal Modernization
client: State of California Department of Transportation
headline: Full-lifecycle modernization of large-scale PHP and Drupal portals for the California DOT.
problem: CALTRANS was running a mix of aging PHP, Drupal 7/8, and WordPress portals that needed architectural modernization, ADA/WCAG remediation, and a production-support capability for Sev-1 incidents.
impact: Owned full SDLC — requirements, architecture, development, testing, deployment, and 24/7 production support.
Delivered ADA/WCAG 2.0 & 2.1 remediation across PHP, Drupal, and WordPress assets.
Authored AS-IS / TO-BE technical docs, architecture diagrams, ERDs, and gap analyses.
Implemented SVN + Jenkins CI/CD across DEV, QA, UAT, and PROD.

name: Decoupled Drupal + React SPAs for CFO Dashboards
headline: Partially decoupled Drupal backend with React/TypeScript SPAs and SSR dashboards for CFO-level stakeholders.
problem: Moody's needed performant, scalable financial summary dashboards integrated with a Drupal backend, while maintaining CMS-driven content publishing and accessibility standards across a large portfolio of internal apps.
impact: Delivered React/TypeScript/Redux SPAs consuming Drupal as a headless backend.
Built SSR dashboards with Node.js + GraphQL for CFO-level stakeholders.
Led performance work that reduced page load by ~25% via DB partitioning and caching.
Served as Accessibility SME — achieved ADA / WCAG 2.1 compliance across web, PDFs, Word, and PowerPoint.

name: JCIT — Drupal Multisite Serving 58 California Courts
headline: A single Drupal multisite on Pantheon serving all 58 California courts — powered by a new Storybook design system.
problem: The Judicial Council needed to consolidate 58 independent court websites into a single global platform with consistent UX, reusable components, and Drupal 8 → 9 migration.
impact: Built a brand-new component system in Storybook aligned with UX/UI designs.
Designed and integrated reusable UI components (headers, footers, nav menus, sidebars) into Drupal themes.
Delivered Drupal 8 → 9 migrations — core upgrades, contributed module remediation, custom module refactoring.
Ensured Section 508 + WCAG compliance across all 58 court deployments.

name: Medicaid.gov & InsureKidsNow.gov — Universal Lead
headline: Universal Lead across Medicaid.gov, InsureKidsNow.gov, Scorecard, and Modernization — release owner for sites serving 50+ states.
problem: Four flagship federal-facing sites needed coordinated release management, SSO hardening, modernization, and high-traffic performance tuning under one Universal Lead.
impact: Solely owned release management across DEV, UAT, PROD — Acquia Cloud deployments, auto-scaling, and alert management.
Led SSO enhancements using Miniorange and SimpleSAMLphp.
Drove modernization — Google Search, site redesigns, visitor segmentation, Mega Menu, Blog Posts, UI/UX.
Implemented Drutiny-based audits for security, accessibility, and Drupal best practices.
